threads.title: Welcome to KLAT OS
threads.author: Admin
threads.excerpt: Welcome to the official KLAT OS community forum. This is the place to discuss development, report bugs, and share ideas.

threads.title: KLAT OS 1.0 Released
threads.author: Admin
threads.excerpt: We are thrilled to announce the first stable release of KLAT OS. Download now and join the community!

threads.title: Roadmap 2027
threads.author: Admin
threads.excerpt: Check out our roadmap for 2027. We plan to add Wayland, PipeWire, Bluetooth, and AI Assistant support.

threads.title: Community Rules
threads.author: Admin
threads.excerpt: Please read and follow our community rules. Be respectful, stay on topic, and help others.

threads.title: Memory Manager Development
threads.author: Developer
threads.excerpt: The memory manager is now fully functional with improved paging and virtual memory support.

threads.title: Scheduler Improvements
threads.author: KernelDev
threads.excerpt: Working on a new CFS-based scheduler for better responsiveness and fairness.

threads.title: Virtual Memory Implementation
threads.author: Developer
threads.excerpt: Virtual memory is now working with demand paging and copy-on-write.

threads.title: IPC Mechanism Design
threads.author: KernelDev
threads.excerpt: Discussing the IPC mechanism for inter-process communication.

threads.title: Window Manager v2.0 Features
threads.author: UITeam
threads.excerpt: Announcing new features in the upcoming window manager release.

threads.title: Theme Engine Discussion
threads.author: UITeam
threads.excerpt: The theme engine now supports custom CSS variables and dark mode.

threads.title: GPU Driver Crash on Boot
threads.author: User123
threads.excerpt: After upgrading the kernel, the GPU driver crashes on boot with kernel panic.

threads.title: USB 3.0 Driver Issues
threads.author: HardwareTest
threads.excerpt: USB 3.0 drivers not recognizing high-speed devices after system resume.

threads.title: New Browser Module
threads.author: FrontendDev
threads.excerpt: Built a modern web browser module with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript support.

threads.title: Office Suite Update
threads.author: AppsTeam
threads.excerpt: The KLAT Office suite now supports DOCX, XLSX, and PPTX formats.

threads.title: AI Assistant Integration
threads.author: TechEnthusiast
threads.excerpt: Suggestion to integrate an AI assistant for system monitoring and optimization.

threads.title: Package Manager Request
threads.author: User456
threads.excerpt: We need a proper package manager with dependency resolution.

threads.title: DNS Resolution Problems
threads.author: NetworkAdmin
threads.excerpt: DNS resolution failing for many domains after recent network stack changes.

threads.title: System Freeze on Sleep
threads.author: BetaTester
threads.excerpt: System freezes when waking from sleep mode on ThinkPad X1 Carbon.
